name: 永夜镇EternalNightTown
short_description: Eternal Night Town is a horror game. Protagonist Xu Fan unexpectedly got a lawyer's letter about his great - aunt's inheritance. Curious, he went to her hometown. In the village, the people seemed oddly strange. Then, he entered a journey he couldn't escape.
detailed_description: "Eternal Night Town" is a Chinese-style horror, suspense, and puzzle-solving game. Players use the mouse to click and perform operations, controlling the character to move left and right, collect clues in the scenes, and solve puzzles. As they continuously explore the story plot, they gradually drive the progress of the game. The protagonist, Xu Fan, unexpectedly received a lawyer's letter regarding his great - aunt's inheritance. Driven by curiosity, he decided to go to his great - aunt's hometown to find out. When he arrived in the village, he found that the people there were all strangely odd. Thus, he plunged headlong into a journey that he couldn't avoid in the first place...

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
